# Simregr

*Simregr* is a package which mplements simple regressions.

## Installation

You need only to pull this repository and then execute ’‘’make’’’ in
terminal then you will be able to use this package.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`Simregr`](https://kitek-013.github.io/Simregr/reference/Simregr-package.md)
  [`Simregr-package`](https://kitek-013.github.io/Simregr/reference/Simregr-package.md)
  : Simregr: Simple regressions and numpy functions
- [`lin.regr()`](https://kitek-013.github.io/Simregr/reference/lin.regr.md)
  : Linear Regression
